destination.description:
Shared destination configuration. A mirror may override the
destination *name* (the path/prefix segment) but not the type
or transport.

mirrors.description:
One mirror per (source topic, partition). Every mirror runs
in its own task; failures terminate the whole process.

root.description: Absolute path to the destination root directory.

format.description: Envelope format for written files. Defaults to `parquet`.

compression.description:
Parquet compression. Only meaningful when `format = parquet`.
Defaults to `zstd-1`.

endpoint.description:
S3 endpoint URL. Required for non-AWS S3 (e.g. VersityGW); omit
for AWS regional endpoints.

prefix.description: Key prefix prepended to all written object keys.

format.description: Envelope format for written objects. Defaults to `parquet`.

compression.description:
Parquet compression. Only meaningful when `format = parquet`.
Defaults to `zstd-1`.

DestinationFormat.description: Envelope format for Filesystem and S3 destinations.

oneOf.description:
Apache Parquet. Columnar, embedded schema, compressed.
Standard data-lake format — readable by DuckDB / Athena /
Spark out of the box.

Newline-delimited JSON, one record per line, base64-encoded
binary fields. Operator-friendly for `jq` debugging; larger
on disk than Parquet.

ParquetCompression.description: Parquet compression codec. Only meaningful when [`DestinationFormat::Parquet`].

oneOf.description: Zstd level 1: strong compression, fast decode. Default.
Zstd level 3: smaller files, slower encode.
Snappy: fast, larger files than zstd.
LZ4: fast, larger files than zstd.
No compression. Debug-friendly; not recommended in production.

FlushTriggers.description:
Flush triggers for blob-style destinations (Filesystem, S3). All
three must be set; any one tripping causes a flush. Set a value to
a very large number to effectively disable that trigger.

max-time-ms.description: Maximum time, in milliseconds, between flushes.

max-bytes.description: Maximum buffered bytes before a flush.

max-offsets.description: Maximum buffered source offsets before a flush.

name.description:
Human-readable identifier; appears in logs, metrics and in the
destination naming when `destination_name_override` is unset.

partition.description: Source Kafka partition. Required, no default.

group-id.description:
Optional consumer group id used for monitoring/back-pressure
only. Restart correctness derives from the destination, never
from committed group offsets.
